ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "store_manager_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the store manager */,
  "store_size" TEXT /* Size of the store */,
  "store_open_date" TEXT /* Date the store was opened */,
  "store_close_date" TEXT /* Date the store was closed */,
  "store_status" TEXT /* Current status of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales data entry */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the sale was made */,
  "year_month" INTEGER /* Year and month of the sale */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales for the month */,
  "num_customers" INTEGER /* Number of customers who made a purchase */,
  "num_transactions_per_customer" REAL /* Average number of transactions per customer */,
  "num_items_per_transaction" REAL /* Average number of items per transaction */,
  "avg_price_per_unit" REAL /* Average price per unit */,
  "transaction_month" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "control_sales" REAL /* Control sales data for comparison */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the sale was made */,
  "hour_of_day" INTEGER /* Hour of the day the sale was made */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Total discount amount applied to the sale */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sale was made on a holiday */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the supplier of the product */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales data entry for the transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "discount_applied" INTEGER /* Indicates if a discount was applied to the transaction */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the promotion applied to the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_member" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is a loyalty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_transactions" (
  "customer_transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the customer for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_transactions_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "subcategory_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales trend */,
  "year_month" INTEGER /* Year and month of the sales trend */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales for the month */,
  "num_customers" INTEGER /* Number of customers who made a purchase */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "segment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segmentation" (
  "customer_segmentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segmentation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the segment */,
  "segmentation_date" TEXT /* Date the customer was segmented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_segmentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segmentation_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segmentation_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "recommended_product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended product */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_recommendations_recommended_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of the campaign */,
  "campaign_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_target" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date of the response */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response */,
  "response_value" REAL /* Value associated with the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_responses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_responses_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "year_month" INTEGER /* Year and month of the forecast */,
  "forecasted_sales" REAL /* Forecasted sales for the month */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used to generate the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id")
)
